name: JosiDog Adult Sensitive 15kg
shortDescription: This appetising dog food is easily digestible for Sensitive & Delicate Digestive tracts of Dogs. A good source of nutrients thanks to its balanced, Gluten-Free recipe for extra special care to help dogs with Sensitive Stomachs. With Taurine that supports heart function, a high level of valuable antioxidants that help the cells to fight off free radicals, Prebiotics and Inulin for healthy gut flora.
description: Composition: Dried poultry protein; rice; whole grain corn; poultry fat; beet fibre; hydrolysed poultry protein; minerals; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus) Product Details: This appetising dog food is easily digestible for Sensitive & Delicate Digestive tracts of Dogs. A good source of nutrients thanks to its balanced, Gluten-Free recipe for extra special care to help dogs with Sensitive Stomachs. With Taurine that supports heart function, a high level of valuable antioxidants that help the cells to fight off free radicals, Prebiotics and Inulin for healthy gut flora.
